headlines.description: Everton did neighbours Liverpool a massive favour by holding title-chasing Arsenal to a 1-1 Premier League draw at Goodison Park on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal stumble as Prem title hopes dented again

events.name: Brighton & Hove Albion at Crystal Palace

headlines.description: Crystal Palace winger Daniel Munoz netted a second-half winner as the Eagles secured a 2-1 Premier League win over Brighton & Hove Albion on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Muñoz gives nine-man Palace win over Brighton

headlines.description: Norwegian forward Jorgen Strand Larsen scored an 84th-minute winner as Wolverhampton Wanderers made it three Premier League victories in a row to boost their survival chances after beating fellow strugglers Ipswich Town 2-1 at Portman Road on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Wolves beat Ipswich to boost Prem survival hopes

events.name: AFC Bournemouth at West Ham United

headlines.description: Bournemouth striker Evanilson struck twice against West Ham United on Saturday to gain his side a point in a 2-2 draw at the London Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Evanilson earns Bournemouth draw at West Ham

headlines.description: Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers and Donyell Malen struck twice in two minutes in a 2-1 Premier League victory over Nottingham Forest on Saturday in an entertaining battle between teams chasing Champions League qualification next season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aston Villa get UCL boost with win over Forest
